parameters.query: SELECT id, agent_context, trigger_type, trigger_source, model, status, input_summary, output_summary, tools_called, started_at, completed_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(completed_at, NOW()) - started_at))::int AS duration_seconds FROM agent_sessions ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT agent_context, COUNT(*) AS total_sessions, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'completed') AS completed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failed') AS failed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE started_at > CURRENT_DATE) AS today FROM agent_sessions GROUP BY agent_context;
SELECT id, agent_context, finding_type, title, confidence, status, created_at FROM agent_findings ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 15;

SELECT agent_context, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'PROPOSED') AS proposed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'CONFIRMED') AS confirmed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'REJECTED') AS rejected FROM agent_findings GROUP BY agent_context;
SELECT server_name, layer, status, last_health_check FROM mcp_servers ORDER BY layer, server_name;

meta.description: GET /webhook/agent-status — Returns agent session history, stats, recent findings, and MCP server health. Used by the Agent Monitor Glance page.
